title: FarmerOnboardingData
description: Minimal farmer profile collected during the onboarding call

farmer_id.description: Unique farmer identifier (provided by the caller, not collected during call)

farmer_phone_number.description: Farmer's phone number in E.164 format (provided by the caller)

farmer_name.description: Farmer's full name as stated by them

state.description: Indian state where the farm is located

land_size_unit.description: Unit of land measurement used by the farmer

primary_crops.description: List of crops the farmer regularly grows

current_season_crop.description: Crop currently growing in the field this season

preferred_language.description: Language the farmer is most comfortable speaking in
